Skip to main content
SUMO SAUCE
PUBLISHED PROFILE LAYER + BASHO BROWSING
Find wrestlers, tournaments, and records fast.

Search the published profile directory, open the latest basho, or jump straight into rankings, rivalries, and milestone context.

SEARCH PUBLISHED PROFILES

497 published profiles are searchable here. 353 currently open full wrestler pages.

LATEST VERIFIED BASHO
shown where published

Homepage counts come from the same published profile dataset the search and directory surfaces now render directly.

WORTH EXPLORING NOW
Start with a curated signal, not a cold directory page

These homepage picks are grounded in currently published standings, visible rivalry data, and the records layer already inside the product. They are editorial entry points, not invented live-storytelling.

Current now
Worth opening first: latest basho overview

If you want the most immediate tournament-first entry point, start with the latest basho overview and branch into a division from there.

Why this is worth exploring: This is the fastest database-first path into something that feels current without pretending the homepage is a live ticker.

What to look at first: Start with the basho overview, then open the Makuuchi division table for the actual standings picture.

Where to go next: From the basho overview, jump into a featured wrestler page or the analytics championship trail.

Open basho browser
Browse basho
Analytics trail
Featured wrestler
Featured rikishi

Open a rikishi page when you want the cleanest combination of profile identity, career shape, rivalry links, and records context.

Why this is worth exploring: This is a strong front-door profile because it leads quickly into records, ranking context, and stable-level browsing without forcing you to decide betw
